sql_array: CREATE TABLE hash_test (id Int32, value String, hash FixedString(16));
INSERT INTO hash_test (id, value, hash) VALUES (1, 'foo', sipHash128('foo', '\x01', 3));
UPDATE hash_test SET hash = sipHash128(value, '\x02', 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, hex(hash) AS hash_hex FROM hash_test WHERE hash = sipHash128('bar', '\x03', 5);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hash_test WHERE hash = sipHash128(value, '\x04', 6);
